text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I saw some students talking in the corridor and
tried to join in, hoping to get to know them
better...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But before I knew it, I was lecturing about
diligence and discipline like a teacher before an
unruly class.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They were so terrified, they started promising me
they would reflect on their behavior.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf sighs dejectedly. She seems a
little down...
